title: Nursery Rhyme. CCLXX. Gaffers And Gammers.
content:
Oh, dear, what can the matter be?
        Two old women got up in an apple tree;
        One came down,
        And the other staid till Saturday.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCLXX. Gaffers And Gammers." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
